items.title: [正面] 美工和剧情不错，反正第一章打完我是太刀了。不过并不算正宗克系、或者只能说低创克系，文案方面使用了太多...
items.summary:
美工和剧情不错，反正第一章打完我是太刀了。不过并不算正宗克系、或者只能说低创克系，文案方面使用了太多的[已屏蔽]（就像哲学小鬼使用男魂符号填充每个字间隙），也有对血肉粘液的描写也过犹不及了。但不追求克系仍然算是好剧情。

另外本版本暂时不能和手机互通，官网pc版本可以，氪金也可以直接在官网用大陆手段氪，在stream版本互通前建议先玩官网pc版。如果遇到开加速器还显示地区受限，就重新登陆一下

items.title:
[负面] Can I give a maybe middling rating?

Story is fine...
items.summary:
Can I give a maybe middling rating?

Story is fine for the most part, though the translation  is a bit off.  

While the card mechanics is most definitely Slay the Spire in nature, I was thankful for it. It made the game pretty easy to get into despite all the in-game world naming conventions.  The dynamics of managing different character combos/synergies, card upgrades, and the like was quite compelling. 

Big problem was all the confusing and far too many sub-systems/currencies for upgrading things.  Took a prompt to upgrade to finally find where to upgrade the characters/awakened, which is in a frankly terrible submenu of a submenu. There are far too many widgets.  Its also terrible gotcha mechanics,  if its so convoluted to tell what each currencies/upgrades/etc. does why would I want to explore any of them.  i'm not gonna to wiki how to maybe figure out the gotchas when I just want to play.  

I don't know if I can recommended this for casual players.   More so, the obvious grind that is coming from poor levelling pacing (to encourage you to the use the poorly explained subsystems/currencies/upgrades) I think I'm done.

items.title: [正面] I'm not in the habit of writing reviews, but this ...
items.summary: I'm not in the habit of writing reviews, but this game is extremely promising that it deserves a spotlight in the world of gatcha and strategy games. It's a mixture of many things: the story is like a visual novel, turn-based battles with cards and characters to play. It also seems very free-to-play friendly, generous rewards and several free SSR choice characters within the first week. The story and music are also interesting, you are like in the shoes of a detective in horror scenarios with a deep sense of mistery. If you like Reverse: 1999, then I also recommend this game. Only big flaw at the moment, is that this game is only on steam, and not on the play store. There is an android version, but only in china, and accounts are not linkable so you cannot keep account progress. But the game has recently been released, so let's be patient. Let's see how it will go!

items.title: [正面] The artwork is more than enough reason to pick thi...
items.summary:
The artwork is more than enough reason to pick this up, but to add to that, there's a very interesting, Lovecraftian storyline, intriguing characters to collect and engaging gameplay.  For a gacha game it's also very generous with its currency, with a very forgiving pity system that allows you to get the Awakers you want with little hassle. 

ETA: After over 3 months I have to say this game still has me hooked. Once your investigation (overall player rank) tier raises, several features become available, as well as certain game modes like PVP and D-Tide.  This game is definitely one that keeps you wanting to play, which you can fully enjoy without spending a dime.

While the dialogue/story is translated using chatGPT, I have to say it's done well enough for you to be able to enjoy and easily understand the plot.  At times it can be a bit rough, but it doesn't take too much away from the overall quality of the game.

items.title: [正面] 喜欢喜欢特别好玩
